title: Episode 01
overview: The RR virus has brought monsters, and mankind has entered the era of Nirvana. In the case of the fall of many countries, only five major countries survived, formed the Earth Alliance and established bases. The main reason for the survival of human beings is that warriors were born among human beings under the influence of RR virus antibodies. Back to 5 years ago, Luo Feng, who was born in a low-rent area, decided to take the college entrance examination in order to realize his dream of becoming a martial artist. That day, Luo Feng met Xu Xin on the street and was about to talk to him. At this time, a flying alien appeared in the sky...

title: Episode 02
overview: After Luo Feng left the school gate, he was besieged by Zhang Haobai, a senior martial arts student, and three others. Luo Feng was in excellent physical condition and fell three people down in a few strokes. The next day was the college entrance examination. Luo Feng left early, and was actually blocked by a group of punks. It turned out that Zhang Haobai had come to hold Luo Feng to prevent him from taking the college entrance examination. Although he was overwhelmed, Luo Feng was still late. Thanks to Mr. Jiang’s help, Luo Feng was allowed to take the exam...

title: Episode 03
overview: The simulation location of the Quasi-Martial Artists assessment is set in the old world, which mainly assesses the strength, speed, survivability and the number of monsters killed. Luo Feng passed the assessment with the first overall quality ranking, and also won the quasi-martialist award-the gene source energy training method, and the actual combat assessment is scheduled for the first of next month...
